archives.role: last commit on the paper publication date
archives.subject: Adjust UI with pass rate on single run view.

timing_boundary: The paper-time snapshot is the last public commit on the arXiv v1 publication date, not a tagged manuscript release. The latest snapshot is implementation evidence only: relative to b0b5c0e it changes 497 files with 48,743 insertions and 15,005 deletions, including generated tasks, noise, schemas, API routes, assertions, runner, evaluator, and tests.
acquisition: Both archives were produced from a complete official git clone with git archive; no credentials or git metadata are included.
